jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Blue Beard
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor book cover illustration for "Blue Beard". The scene depicts the wife, a young woman with long dark hair and a pale dress, kneeling and peering, wide-eyed with horror, into a small, dark doorway, the forbidden closet. Inside, silhouetted against a dark red background streaked with crimson, the ghostly figures of dead women are barely visible. The dominant colors are deep blues and reds. Bluebeard, a large man with a dramatically exaggerated blue beard, stands behind her with a menacing posture, a glint of cruel triumph in his eyes. A key, stained with a bright impossible-to-clean blood red, lies on the floor near the wife's trembling hand. Warm, soft lighting creates a unsettling fairy tale atmosphere.

jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Cinderella; or, the little glass slipper
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor book cover illustration depicting the moment Cinderella arrives at the ball. The coach, a luminous, gilded pumpkin-carriage, pulled by six dappled grey mice-horses, is in the foreground. Cinderella, with sparkling glass slippers and a gown of shimmering cloth-of-gold adorned with jewels, is gracefully descending, hand-in-hand with the Prince. He is handsome, with a kind smile and a royal blue coat. The ballroom, filled with elegantly dressed guests, is visible through large arched windows, bathed in warm, soft light from chandeliers. All eyes are on Cinderella. The overall mood is magical and enchanting, with a fairy tale atmosphere. Colors are warm golds, blues, and pinks, with a focus on the radiant glow of Cinderella and her coach.

jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: East of the sun and West of the moon
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor book cover illustration for "East of the Sun and West of the Moon". A beautiful young woman with long golden hair, wearing simple, mended clothing, sits on the back of a massive, fluffy white bear. They are traversing a snow-covered mountain pass at night. The bear looks strong and gentle, his fur detailed with soft, feathery strokes. The mountain is silhouetted against a dark blue, star-filled sky, with the moon – a soft, warm light source - illuminating their path and casting long shadows. In the distance, nestled amongst snow-covered peaks, a grand, glowing castle shimmers, promising both beauty and unknown dangers. The air sparkles with magical, swirling snowflakes. The overall mood is one of fairy tale enchantment and impending quest, with warm but muted colors.

jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Felicia and the pot of pinks
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-esque watercolor illustration for "Felicia and the Pot of Pinks". Felicia, around 16, with large, innocent eyes and braided dark hair, wearing simple peasant clothes, kneels beside a moonlit fountain. She is bathed in the soft, warm glow of a nearby, opulent procession led by the Queen of the Woods. The Queen, elegant and ethereal with flowing robes and a gentle expression, gestures warmly towards Felicia. The fountain sparkles with magical light, and Felicia's discarded wooden pitcher miraculously transforms into a golden vessel adorned with diamonds. In the background, a dark forest provides a mystical atmosphere. The overall mood is one of enchantment, kindness, and hopeful discovery, rendered in a palette of soft blues, pinks, golds, and greens, capturing the fairy tale essence of the story.

jobs.author: andrew_lang
jobs.title: Hansel and Grettel
jobs.prompt: A Studio Ghibli-inspired, hand-painted watercolor book cover illustration of Hansel and Gretel lost in the woods. It is night, and a full moon illuminates the scene with a soft, warm glow, dappling through the dense trees. Hansel, a small boy with tousled brown hair and patched clothes, holds Gretel's hand. Gretel, slightly younger, has long blonde braids and wears a simple dress. They look exhausted and scared, glancing around at the towering, stylized trees with large, expressive eyes. The forest floor is covered in fallen leaves and moss, with faint, scattered breadcrumbs barely visible. In the background, stylized, dark silhouettes of trees create depth. The overall mood is one of vulnerability and a touch of melancholy, with cool blues and greens of the forest contrasting with the moon's warm, hopeful light. A fairy tale atmosphere with detailed textures and gentle rendering.
